export.title: Export Center
export.targetDescription.codex_markdown: Markdown instruction file for handing audio context to Codex manually.
export.targetDescription.codex_json: Structured JSON context for handing audio context to Codex manually.
export.targetDescription.generic_manifes: Engine-neutral JSON manifest for game audio tools.
export.targetDescription.unity_manifest: Unity-oriented JSON manifest. No Unity project files are changed.
export.targetDescription.unreal_json: Unreal-oriented JSON manifest. No Unreal project files are changed.
export.targetDescription.unreal_csv: Unreal-friendly CSV report for DataTable-style workflows.
export.targetDescription.monogame_conten: Copy/paste content list for MonoGame mgcb workflows.
export.targetDescription.sound_pack_meta: Metadata-only sound pack JSON without copying audio.
export.targetDescription.sound_pack_fold: Copy-only sound pack folder with metadata and optional audio files.
export.targetDescription.csv_report: Flat CSV report for spreadsheet review.
export.targetDescription.project_sound_p: Package approved selected project sounds into engine-specific folders and manifests.
export.targetDescription.project_manifes: Export the project sound usage board as an engine-oriented manifest.
export.targetDescription.project_missing: Summarize required missing sounds, candidate gaps, and project risks.
export.targetDescription.project_codex_i: Create an instruction file for Codex game-audio implementation work.
export.targetDescription.sound_request_m: Create a Markdown request sheet for missing, review, and risky project sounds.
export.targetDescription.sound_request_c: Create a flat CSV request sheet for spreadsheet review.
export.targetDescription.sound_request_j: Create structured JSON for a local sound request workflow.
export.targetDescription.project_style_g: Export the user-written project sound style guide as Markdown.
export.targetDescription.project_checkli: Export the project sound checklist as Markdown.
export.targetDescription.sound_pack_snap: Export a frozen or current sound pack snapshot as JSON.
export.targetDescription.sound_pack_chan: Export a Markdown changelog from a snapshot to the current board.
Export a machine-readable sound pack changelog.
Export a spreadsheet-friendly sound pack changelog.
export.targetDescription.sound_change_re: Export a Markdown report for approved, rejected, deferred, and pending sound changes.
Export a machine-readable sound change review report.
Export a spreadsheet-friendly sound change review report.
export.projectShortcutHint: This shortcut opens Export Center for preview and validation before any files are written.
